name: Jiangsu Hengshun Vinegar-Industry Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Hengshun Vinegar-Industry Co.,Ltd produces and sells vinegar products in China. It offers a range of vinegar products, such as classic, color, and white vinegars, as well as soy sauce, sesame oil, pickles, sauces, chicken, snack foods, wine, and seasoning products. The company was founded in 1840 and is based in Zhenjiang, China.
